summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Notifications V2 module. All 26 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend testing verified: admin can create broadcasts, sidebar shows Notificaciones entry, header bell uses V2 endpoints with fallback. Role-based access control working correctly - residents and guards get 403 when trying to create broadcasts.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ GET /api/notifications/v2 - Pagination, unread_only filter, notification_type filter all working
✅ GET /api/notifications/v2/unread-count - Returns correct count for all roles
✅ POST /api/notifications/v2/broadcast - Admin/SuperAdmin can create, Resident/Guard get 403
✅ PATCH /api/notifications/v2/read/{id} - Mark single notification as read works
✅ PATCH /api/notifications/v2/read-all - Mark all notifications as read works
✅ GET /api/notifications/v2/broadcasts - Admin broadcast history with pagination
✅ GET /api/notifications/v2/preferences - Returns user preferences with defaults
✅ PATCH /api/notifications/v2/preferences - Updates preferences, validates empty body
✅ Frontend NotificationsPage.js has proper data-testid attributes for testing
✅ Header.js uses V2 endpoints with try/catch fallback to legacy
✅ Sidebar.js shows Notificaciones entry for Administrador role only

success_rate.backend: 100% (26/26 passed, 2 skipped due to fixture dependencies)

seed_data_creation: Test broadcasts created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notifications V2 module fully tested and working. All endpoints under /api/notifications/v2/* are functional. Role-based access control verified: only Administrador and SuperAdmin can create broadcasts. Legacy endpoints at /api/notifications still work. Frontend page at /admin/notifications renders correctly with broadcast form, history, and notification list. Header bell uses V2 endpoints with fallback to legacy.

GET /api/notifications/v2.evidence: Returns paginated notifications with items, total, page, page_size, total_pages

GET /api/notifications/v2/unread-count.evidence: Returns {count: N} for all authenticated users

POST /api/notifications/v2/broadcast (Ad.evidence: Admin can create broadcast with title, message, type, priority, target_roles

PATCH /api/notifications/v2/read/{id}.evidence: Marks notification as read, returns 404 for invalid ID

PATCH /api/notifications/v2/read-all.evidence: Marks all user's notifications as read, returns count

GET /api/notifications/v2/broadcasts.evidence: Admin gets paginated broadcast history, Resident gets 403

PATCH /api/notifications/v2/preferences.evidence: Updates preferences, returns 400 for empty body

Frontend /admin/notifications page.evidence: Renders broadcast form, history, notification list with proper data-testid

Sidebar Notificaciones entry.evidence: Shows for Administrador role with 'Alertas y broadcasts' description

Header bell V2 integration.evidence: Uses V2 endpoints with fallback to legacy, shows unread count badge
